summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All new features verified: Workflow Builder (3 tabs, CRUD operations), Marketing Panel (Ad Manager + Landing Hooks), Appointment action buttons (Call, Send Pin, Send Reminder, Follow Up), Call buttons on Leads (Kanban + Table views), XAC logo in sidebar/login, Workflows and Ad Manager nav items. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly and working as expected
Workflow Builder: 3 tabs (New Lead, Appointment, Triggers), CRUD operations working, step types (WhatsApp, Wait, Change Stage, Assign To, Send Reminder) all functional
Marketing Panel: Ad Manager shows webhook URL, lead counts, recent ad leads; Landing Hooks generates 6 landing pages with hooks and CTAs
Appointment action buttons: Call (blue), Send Pin (orange), Send Reminder (amber), Follow Up (violet) - all visible on booked slots
Call buttons on Leads: Blue PhoneCall icon visible on both Kanban cards and Table view rows
XAC logo: Visible on landing page, login page, and sidebar
Navigation: Workflows and Ad Manager nav items visible for admin users
plain_password display: Feature implemented correctly - shows in Edit User modal only when plain_password exists for user
seed_data_creation: Test workflows and appointments created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features all working: (1) Workflow Builder at /workflows with 3 tabs and CRUD operations, (2) Marketing Panel at /marketing-panel with Ad Manager and Landing Hooks tabs, (3) Appointment action buttons (Call, Send Pin, Send Reminder, Follow Up) appear on booked appointment slots, (4) Call buttons (blue PhoneCall icon) on Leads page in both Kanban and Table views, (5) XAC logo displayed throughout app, (6) Workflows and Ad Manager nav items in sidebar for admin, (7) plain_password display in Edit User modal when available. All APIs tested: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/workflows, GET /api/webhook-logs, POST /api/ai/landing-pages.
